name: Cal.com
description: Monitor Cal.com scheduling infrastructure for team access and availability compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Cal.com at https://cal.com
2. Go to Settings → Developer → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Cal.com Settings → Developer → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Cal.com team members and their scheduling access

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Cal.com scheduling service is active and accessible
